hero.title: XLSX to PDF
hero.subtitle: Export spreadsheets to PDF for sharing and printing.

about_formats: XLSX is Microsoft Excel's workbook format.
PDF is ideal for sharing and printing spreadsheets.
common_problems: Complex formulas may not translate to static PDF
Large sheets may produce multiple pages

faq.question: Are formulas preserved?
faq.answer: PDF is static; formulas are not preserved in the PDF output.
